summary: Tested new Sales module end-to-end. All 13 backend tests passed. UI tests confirmed: Sales nav item works, page loads with summary cards and table, Record Sale modal opens with vehicle/customer dropdowns, preset expense checkboxes with editable amounts, custom expense add/remove, grand total updates correctly, sale saved with toast success, table shows all columns, delete with confirm restores vehicle to available.

issues: Console hydration warnings: <span> inside <th>/<tr>/<tbody> - from Emergent editor tooling only, not production bugs (same pattern as previous modules)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/sales enriches each sale with N+1 DB queries (vehicle + customer lookup per sale row). Acceptable at current scale but should be batched for performance at scale.
DELETE /api/sales/{sid} does not delete associated sale from customer last_purchase_date (minor inconsistency).
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up test sales. One sale (Honda Dio 2022) remained from smoke testing; not deleted. Honda Shine 2009 sale created and deleted during frontend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales module fully tested. All features work: Record Sale modal (vehicle/customer dropdowns, preset expenses with editable amounts, custom expenses, grand total calculation), save creates sale and marks vehicle sold, delete removes sale and restores vehicle. Summary cards update correctly. One existing sale: Honda Dio 2022 (0406155) with Rs. 1,87,500 total.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. All Sales module features working as expected.
